sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35559" key="e)nqauqoi=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθαυθοῖ</orth>, <sense id="n35559.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνταυθοῖ</ref> </xr> (q.v.). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθαῦτα</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνταῦθα.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
